visual_cues: default apps like Gmail, Photos, YouTube

states.description: Android app drawer showing all installed apps

visual_cues: list of recipe cards with title and short description
green header bar with category filter dropdown

states.description: Dropdown menu listing recipe categories to filter list
visual_cues: dropdown menu with items: All recipes, Seasonal recipes, Recipes without category, Favorites
search bar at top with 'Search in ALL RECIPES' hint

states.description: Dropdown menu on recipe details page
visual_cues: Share, Share as file, Edit, Delete options
Title, Categories, Description, Source, Servings, Time, Ingredients, Directions fields
image placeholder at top with camera icon

states.description: Dialog shown when tapping Categories on a new recipe (may show 'No categories have been created yet')
visual_cues: 'No categories have been created yet.' message
resource_hints: No categories have been created yet

states.description: Dialog to choose how to provide a recipe cover photo
System photo picker / Gallery / Photos selection screen
visual_cues: browse files in other apps list

states.description: Camera viewfinder for taking a photo
Full-screen immersive cooking guide for a recipe
visual_cues: swipe between Ingredients and step slides
Recipes, Categories, Seasonal calendar, Settings options

states.description: Screen listing custom categories with FAB to add
visual_cues: 'Create custom categories to manage your recipes.' empty hint

states.description: Dialog to enter a new category name
First-run informational overlay shown when entering cooking view

transitions.postcondition: Fields pre-populated with existing recipe data
Navigates between Ingredients and step slides

strategies.name: OPEN_APP
steps: If Broccoli icon visible on home/dock, click it
Else swipe up to open app_drawer
Click Broccoli app icon
strategies.fallback: If wrong app opens, press Home and retry

strategies.name: CREATE_RECIPE
steps: Click floating + (FAB) bottom-right to open new_recipe_editor
Click Title field and type recipe name
Press Back to dismiss keyboard if subsequent fields hidden
Optionally fill Categories, Description, Source, Servings, Time, Ingredients, Directions
For multi-line ingredients, press Enter between items
Click SAVE in top-right
strategies.success_signal: Recipe details page shown with entered title; toast 'The recipe has been saved'
strategies.fallback: If Categories shows 'No categories have been created yet.', dismiss with OK and save without category, or create category first via navigation_drawer > Categories > FAB

strategies.name: DELETE_RECIPE
strategies.preconditions: On recipe_list with target recipe visible
steps: Click recipe card to open recipe_details
Click three-dot overflow menu top-right
Click Delete
Click DELETE in confirmation dialog
strategies.success_signal: Returned to recipe_list and recipe absent (or 'No recipes found')
strategies.fallback: If app auto-navigates to next recipe, press Back and verify list; for duplicates, repeat process

strategies.name: EDIT_RECIPE_FIELD
steps: Click three-dot menu > Edit to open new_recipe_editor pre-filled
Tap target field (e.g. Time, Servings, Title, Ingredients, Description)
To replace text: long-press to bring up selection menu, choose Select all, then type new value (or place cursor at end and long-press backspace)
Click SAVE top-right
strategies.success_signal: Recipe details page shows updated value; toast 'The recipe has been saved'
strategies.fallback: If cursor is mid-word, tap end of text then long-press backspace; ensure entire old value is cleared before typing

strategies.name: FAVORITE_RECIPE
steps: Click heart icon top-right (becomes solid white when favorited)
strategies.fallback: If multiple taps occur it toggles off; verify by returning to list, opening filter dropdown and selecting Favorites

strategies.name: FILTER_BY_CATEGORY
steps: Click 'All recipes' header dropdown
Select desired category (All recipes / Seasonal recipes / Recipes without category / Favorites)
strategies.success_signal: Header text shows chosen filter and list updates accordingly
strategies.fallback: If list empty though item should be present, re-do favoriting/categorization

strategies.name: SEARCH_RECIPE
steps: Click search (magnifying glass) icon top-right
Type query into 'Search in ALL RECIPES' field
Click desired matching result
strategies.fallback: Scroll list manually if search returns no results

strategies.name: VIEW_RECIPE_INFO
steps: Click recipe card
Read servings (next to person icon), time (next to clock icon), Ingredients, Directions
strategies.success_signal: Required info read off details page
strategies.fallback: Use Back to return to list to view other recipes

strategies.name: ENTER_COOKING_VIEW_AND_SCALE
steps: Click floating fork-and-knife FAB bottom-right
Dismiss 'Viewing full screen' overlay with 'Got it' if present
Click sliders/settings icon top-right
Choose SIMPLE tab and use +/- on Servings, or PRO tab and type Scaling factor
Click OK
strategies.success_signal: Cooking view shows updated ingredient amounts
strategies.fallback: If PRO input shows leftover digits, tap end of text and use backspace to clear before typing

strategies.name: CREATE_CATEGORY
steps: Click hamburger menu top-left
Click Categories
Click floating + FAB
Tap Name field, type category name
Click SAVE
strategies.success_signal: New category appears in categories list
strategies.fallback: If drawer fails to open or selection ignored, re-tap hamburger menu and retry

strategies.name: ADD_RECIPE_PHOTO
steps: Tap image placeholder / camera icon
In Change photo dialog choose 'Take photo' (or 'Pick photo')
Tap shutter button to capture (or select an image)
strategies.success_signal: Photo replaces default placeholder at top of editor
strategies.fallback: If gallery/photos appear empty, back out and use 'Take photo'

dead_ends.failed_action: Trying to select a non-existent category from new_recipe_editor
dead_ends.note: App shows 'No categories have been created yet.'; loop of dismissing OK does not create one. Must navigate via drawer > Categories > FAB to create the category first

dead_ends.failed_action: Repeated backspace long-press on Time/Servings/Ingredients field with cursor in middle of text
dead_ends.note: Only deletes characters left of cursor, leaving residual text. Place cursor at end first or use long-press + Select all
Each tap toggles favorite; even number of taps leaves recipe unfavorited. Verify by checking Favorites filter

dead_ends.failed_action: Pick photo when gallery is empty
dead_ends.note: Recent images may show 'No items'. Use 'Take photo' with in-app camera or browse other providers

dead_ends.failed_action: Typing new value without clearing/selecting existing text first
dead_ends.note: Causes appended text (e.g. 'Beef Stir FryBeef and Vegetable Stir Fry'). Always Select all or fully clear before typing

categories.name: ADD_ENTRY
categories.precondition: On the main list screen of a collection-style app
abstract_steps: Trigger create action (commonly via a floating + button)
Dismiss keyboard or scroll to reveal hidden fields if needed
Optionally set secondary attributes (categories, quantities, durations, media)
failure_modes: Tapping unintended adjacent field due to dense form
Required attribute relies on a prerequisite that doesn't yet exist (e.g. empty category list)
Keyboard hides target fields; not scrolling causes blind clicks
Save button missed because it is in top app bar while keyboard is open
verification_checklist: After save, the new item appears in the main list
Detail view of the new item shows all entered attributes
A success toast or status message is observed (if applicable)

categories.name: DELETE_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Target item exists and is reachable from a list
failure_modes: Confirmation dialog dismissed without confirming (tap outside)
Auto-navigation to next item after deletion gives false impression of failure
Multiple duplicate items: deleting one leaves others; must repeat
verification_checklist: Returned to list and target item is no longer present
If duplicates existed, count is decreased by one per deletion

categories.name: EDIT_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Target item exists and supports edit
abstract_steps: Open overflow menu and choose Edit
Clear existing value (place cursor at end, long-press backspace, or long-press then Select all)
failure_modes: Typing without clearing causes appended/duplicated text
Cursor stuck mid-text so backspace only deletes a portion
Forgetting to tap Save loses changes
Editing wrong field due to mis-tap
verification_checklist: Detail view reflects the new value
Persists after navigating away and back
Success toast or returns to detail without error

categories.name: TOGGLE_FLAG
categories.precondition: On item detail view with a toggleable state icon (e.g. favorite, bookmark)
abstract_steps: Locate the toggle icon (often top-right of detail view)
failure_modes: Tapping repeatedly toggles state back to original
Misjudging current state when icon is small / on light background
verification_checklist: Icon visual matches desired state (filled/empty)
Item appears (or disappears) in the corresponding filtered list

categories.name: FILTER_LIST
categories.precondition: On a list with a category/filter selector
failure_modes: Filter shows empty though an item should match (prior action did not persist)
Dropdown not opened due to mis-tap
verification_checklist: Header now displays chosen filter label
Visible items correspond to the filter

categories.name: SEARCH_QUERY
categories.precondition: On a list with search affordance
failure_modes: Misspelled query yields zero results
Search scope differs from expected category
verification_checklist: Result list contains expected matches
Selecting a result navigates to its detail view

categories.name: QUERY_INFO
categories.precondition: Target item exists and is reachable
abstract_steps: Read requested attribute(s) from the screen
failure_modes: Reading attribute from wrong item due to duplicates
Unit or format mismatch in the answer
verification_checklist: Answer is taken from the correct item
Format matches the user's requested format

categories.name: COMPARE_ITEMS
categories.precondition: Multiple items exist and a common attribute can be compared
abstract_steps: Open first item, read attribute, remember it
Compute comparison and produce final answer
failure_modes: Forgetting first value after navigation
Comparing different units (e.g. minutes vs hours) without conversion
verification_checklist: Both attribute values are recorded
Comparison uses normalized units
Answer matches requested response format

categories.name: NAVIGATE_TO_SECTION
categories.precondition: App has a side drawer or hierarchical menu
failure_modes: Drawer fails to open on first attempt
Selection ignored if tapped during animation
verification_checklist: Target section title/header is visible

categories.name: CONFIGURE_INLINE_SETTING
abstract_steps: Adjust value via +/- controls or numeric input (clear existing value first)
failure_modes: Leaving stray characters when overwriting numeric input
Confirming on wrong tab
verification_checklist: Underlying content reflects the new setting
Dialog closes without error

categories.name: ATTACH_MEDIA
categories.precondition: An entry editor supports media attachment
abstract_steps: Tap media placeholder or attach control
Choose source (existing library or capture new)
failure_modes: Selected source has no content (empty gallery)
Capture not registered on first tap of shutter
verification_checklist: Editor shows the attached media replacing the placeholder
After save, detail view shows the media
